title: cytisus rigidus
intro: Cytisus rigidus, also known as the Stiff Broom or Prickly Broom, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat various skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and coumarins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Cytisus rigidus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with medications.
